kinyarwanda.try_all_3_scale_views: Gerageza uburyo bwose 3 bwo kureba ingano
kinyarwanda.get_ai_analysis_of_your_mix: Bona isesengura rya AI ry'ivanze ryawe
kinyarwanda.build_a_solution_mix_totaling_200_gt: Ubaka ivanze ry'ibisubizo rigera kuri 200+ Gt
kinyarwanda.zero_emissions_your_legs_are_the_green: Zeru gusohora! Amaguru yawe ni moteri iyubaha kamere kurusha izindi.
kinyarwanda.shared_ride_about_0_3_kg_co_per_studen: Kugendera hamwe — hafi 0.3 kg CO₂ kuri buri munyeshuri kuri buri rugendo.
kinyarwanda.a_car_emits_0_21_kg_co_km_solo_trips_a: Imodoka isohora ~0.21 kg CO₂/km. Ingendo z'ukwawe zikusanya vuba.
kinyarwanda.splitting_rides_cuts_per_person_emissi: Gusaranganya ingendo bigabanya isohoka kuri buri muntu 50-75%.
kinyarwanda.fruits_veggies_grains_beans_lowest_foo: Imbuto, imboga, imyaka, ibishyimbo — ikirenge cy'ibiryo gito kurusha ibindi.
kinyarwanda.some_meat_some_veggies_average_diet: Inyama nkeya, imboga nkeya. Imirire iciriritse.
kinyarwanda.beef_produces_60_kg_co_per_kg_of_meat: Inyama y'inka isohora 60 kg CO₂ kuri buri kg y'inyama.
kinyarwanda.what_powers_your_home: Ni iki gitanga ingufu mu rugo rwawe?
kinyarwanda.us_grid_0_4_kg_co_per_kwh: Urusobe rwa Amerika: ~0.4 kg CO₂ kuri kWh.
kinyarwanda.coal_heavy_grids_up_to_1_kg_co_kwh: Insobe zishingiye ku makara: kugeza 1 kg CO₂/kWh.
kinyarwanda.what_happens_to_your_trash: Ni iki kibaho ku myanda yawe?
kinyarwanda.compost_recycle: Guhindura ifumbire no gukoresha bundi bushya
kinyarwanda.composting_diverts_methane_producing_w: Guhindura ifumbire bikura imyanda isohora methane.
kinyarwanda.recycling_saves_1_ton_co_per_ton_of_ma: Gukoresha bundi bushya bizigama ~1 tone CO₂ kuri buri tone y'ibikoresho.
kinyarwanda.typical_us_gas_car_0_21_kg_co_e_km: Imodoka ya lisansi ya Amerika isanzwe: 0.21 kg CO₂e/km.
kinyarwanda.carpool_of_3_cuts_per_person_emissions: Gusangira imodoka abantu batatu bigabanya isohoka kuri buri muntu 65%.
kinyarwanda.electric_rail_is_4_cleaner_than_a_car: Gari ya moshi y'amashanyarazi isukuye 4× kuruta imodoka.
kinyarwanda.improves_as_the_grid_decarbonizes: Biratera imbere uko urusobe rukura karubone.
kinyarwanda.walk_bike_any_distance: Kugenda n'amaguru / igare (intera iyo ari yo yose)
kinyarwanda.zero_emissions_also_health_benefits: Zeru gusohora. Kandi inyungu ku buzima.
kinyarwanda.aviation_has_2_3_warming_impact_beyond: Indege ifite ingaruka yo gushyuha 2-3× kurenza CO₂ yonyine.
kinyarwanda.one_long_haul_round_trip_3_tons_a_year: Urugendo rumwe rurerure rwo kujya no kugaruka = ~3 tone — umwaka wose wo gutwara ku bantu benshi.
kinyarwanda.60_kg_co_e_per_kg_of_beef_highest_of_a: 60 kg CO₂e kuri buri kg y'inyama y'inka — hejuru kuruta ibiribwa byose.
kinyarwanda.second_highest_emitter_after_beef: Usohora wa kabiri uri hejuru, nyuma y'inyama y'inka.
kinyarwanda.varies_farmed_salmon_higher_wild_cod_l: Biratandukanye: salmon yororwa hejuru, cod yo mu gasozi hasi.
kinyarwanda.dairy_cattle_also_produce_methane: Inka z'amata na zo zisohora methane.
kinyarwanda.beans_rice_veggies_lowest_possible_foo: Ibishyimbo + umuceri + imboga = ikirenge gito gishoboka.
kinyarwanda.disposable_cups_add_50_vs_home_brewed: Ibikombe byo guta byongeraho ~50% ugereranyije n'icyakorewe mu rugo.
kinyarwanda.natural_gas_2_kg_therm_winter_only: Gaze karemano: ~2 kg/therm. Igihe cy'itumba gusa.
kinyarwanda.us_grid_average_lower_in_ca_higher_in_: Impuzandengo y'urusobe rwa Amerika; hasi muri CA, hejuru muri WV.
kinyarwanda.4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnace: Ikora neza 4× kuruta itanura rya gaze.
kinyarwanda.netflix_2023_report_lower_than_older_e: Raporo ya Netflix 2023 — munsi y'ibigereranyo bya kera.
kinyarwanda.3g_co_e_per_text_prompt_long_context_1: ~3g CO₂e kuri buri prompt y'inyandiko. Ibibazo by'imvugo ndende (1M token) bihenda ~3× kurushaho.
kinyarwanda.dall_e_midjourney_stable_diffusion_10_: DALL-E / Midjourney / Stable Diffusion: ~10–30g kuri buri shusho. Biremereye 5–10× kuruta inyandiko.
kinyarwanda.sora_runway_kling_100_500g_per_clip_sc: Sora / Runway / Kling: ~100–500g kuri buri clip. Byiyongera ku murongo hamwe n'uburebure bwa clip + resolution. Biremereye 50×+ kuruta inyandiko.
kinyarwanda.elevenlabs_murf_openai_tts_1_3g_per_sh: ElevenLabs / Murf / OpenAI TTS: ~1–3g kuri buri clip ngufi.
kinyarwanda.ai_code_assistant_completion: Kurangiza umufasha wa kode wa AI
kinyarwanda.copilot_cursor_claude_code_long_contex: Copilot / Cursor / Claude Code: prompts za kode z'imvugo ndende ~5g kuri buri.
kinyarwanda.polyester_lifetime_of_oil_extraction: Polyester = ubuzima bwose bwo gucukura peteroli.
kinyarwanda.keep_phones_3_years_to_halve_annual_im: Bika telefoni imyaka 3+ kugira ngo ugabanye ingaruka y'umwaka kimwe cya kabiri.
kinyarwanda.manufacturing_dominates_laptop_emissio: Gukora niryo rihama ku isohoka rya laptop.
kinyarwanda.2_day_shipping_3_slower_shipping: Kohereza mu minsi 2 = 3× byo kohereza gahoro.
kinyarwanda.shein_temu_avg_25_kg_per_order: Shein/Temu impuzandengo: 25 kg kuri buri komande.
kinyarwanda.negative_recycling_avoids_emissions: Nibi! Gukoresha bundi bushya birinda isohoka.
kinyarwanda.avoids_methane_and_builds_soil_carbon: Birinda methane KANDI byubaka karubone yo mu butaka.
kinyarwanda.tap_water_500_cleaner_emissions_wise: Amazi yo mu mubombo = asukuye ~500× ku birebana n'isohoka.
kinyarwanda.what_every_person_needs_to_reach_by_20: Icyo buri muntu akeneye kugeraho mu 2030 kugira ngo agume munsi ya 1.5°C.
kinyarwanda.cities_like_burlington_vt_already_run_: Imijyi nka Burlington, Vermont isanzwe ikoresha amashanyarazi ashobora kuvugururwa 100%!
kinyarwanda.a_diverse_portfolio_is_the_most_resili: Portefeuille itandukanye ni uburyo bukomeye kurusha ubundi.
kinyarwanda.denmark_gets_55_of_electricity_from_wi: Danemarke isanzwe ibona 55% by'amashanyarazi yayo mu muyaga.
kinyarwanda.the_world_adds_renewables_faster_than_: Isi yongeraho ingufu zishobora kuvugururwa vuba kurusha ikindi gihe cyose.
kinyarwanda.ocean_kelp_farms: Imirima ya Kelp yo mu Nyanja
kinyarwanda.stable_for_10_000_years_holocene_clima: Bihamye imyaka 10,000. Ikirere cya Holocène aho umuco wose w'abantu wakuriye.
kinyarwanda.charles_david_keeling_begins_continuou: Charles David Keeling atangira gukurikirana CO₂ ku buryo buhoraho i Mauna Loa. Umurongo we wagaragaje ko ubushyuhe buterwa n'abantu ari ukuri.
kinyarwanda.climate_scientist_james_hansen_tells_u: Umuhanga w'ikirere James Hansen abwira Kongere ya Amerika ko ubushyuhe bwatangiye. 350.org ifata 350 ppm nk'urubibi “rutekanye”.
kinyarwanda.first_time_atmospheric_co_crossed_400_: Ubwa mbere CO₂ yo mu kirere yarengeje 400 ppm mu myaka miliyoni 3+. Igihe cya nyuma cya 400 ppm cy'Isi: amashyamba y'ubushyuhe ku mpera z'isi.
kinyarwanda.current_level_highest_in_at_least_800_: Urwego rwa none. Rwo hejuru cyane mu byibura imyaka 800,000 (biva mu bikonje). Bingana na ~1.2°C by'ubushyuhe.
kinyarwanda.threshold_associated_with_2_c_warming_: Urubibi rufitanye isano n'ubushyuhe bwa 2°C nibikomeza. Intego y'Amasezerano ya Paris: kuguma munsi ya 1.5°C.
kinyarwanda.mass_coral_bleaching_events_hit_the_gr: Ibintu byinshi byo kwera kwa korali byakubise Great Barrier Reef mu 2016, 2017, 2020, 2022, na 2024. Ku bushyuhe bwa 1.5°C, 70–90% by'amabuye ya korali y'ubushyuhe arapfa. Kuri 2°C, 99% arapfa.
kinyarwanda.the_greenland_ice_sheet_holds_enough_w: Urubura rwa Greenland rufite amazi ahagije yo kuzamura urwego rw'inyanja metero 7 (23 ft). Ku ~1.5°C bikomeje, gushonga bihinduka ikitagaruka mu binyejana kugeza ku bihumbi by'imyaka.
kinyarwanda.the_atlantic_meridional_overturning_ci: Uruziga rwa AMOC rutwara ubushyuhe ruva mu turere dushyushye rukajya Uburayi. Rwagabanutse 15% kuva 1950. Guhagarara burundu byakonjesha Uburayi bw'amajyaruguru cyane bikanabangamira imvura ya monsoon muri Afurika na Aziya.
kinyarwanda.the_amazon_generates_half_its_own_rain: Amazon itanga kimwe cya kabiri cy'imvura yayo. Hamwe no gutema amashyamba 20–25% + ubushyuhe buzamuka, ifite ibyago byo guhinduka iva ku ishyamba ry'imvura ikajya ku isambu. Ubushakashatsi bumwe bwerekana ko urubibi rwegereye 2°C ku gipimo cyo gutema cy'ubu.
kinyarwanda.arctic_permafrost_holds_twice_the_carb: Permafrost ya Arctique ifite karubone incuro ebyiri z'iri mu kirere ubu. Ishyuha 3–4× vuba kuruta impuzandengo y'isi, isanzwe irashonga ikanasohora CO₂ na methane (bikomeye 28× kuruta CO₂ mu myaka 100).
kinyarwanda.marine_based_ice_sheets_anchored_below: Urubura rushingiye ku nyanja rwakomejwe munsi y'urwego rw'inyanja. Amazi ashyushye y'inyanja arayarigata avuye hasi. Urubura rwa Thwaites (“Doomsday Glacier”) ni cyo cyago nyamukuru. Guhirima bizazamura urwego rw'inyanja metero 3.3 (11 ft).
kinyarwanda.northern_coniferous_forests_russia_can: Amashyamba y'amajyaruguru y'ibihuru (Uburusiya, Kanada, Scandinavia) ari mu mihangayiko iterwa n'ubushyuhe, udukoko tw'ibishishwa, n'inkongi z'amashyamba. Guhinduka burundu bikaba ubwatsi bishobora gusohora karubone nyinshi cyane yabitswe.
kinyarwanda.gulf_of_maine_rapid_warming: Ubushyuhe Bwihuse bwa Gulf of Maine
kinyarwanda.the_gulf_of_maine_has_warmed_faster_th: Gulf of Maine yashyushye vuba kuruta 99% by'inyanja z'isi kuva 1980 — hafi 0.5°F kuri buri myaka icumi, hafi 3× impuzandengo y'inyanja ku isi. Umuyaga ukonje wa Labrador wagabanutse mu gihe amazi ashyushye ya Gulf Stream ageze mu majyaruguru cyane, ari kuvugurura urusobe rw'ibiribwa mu gihe nyacyo kuva ku shingiro. Imiryango yo ku nkombe ya Penobscot, Passamaquoddy, Maliseet, na Mi’kmaq bari barandika iyi mihindagurikire mu nyandiko z'akanwa mu myaka mirongo mbere y'uko satelite zibyemeza.
kinyarwanda.cheapest_electricity_worldwide_in_2024: Amashanyarazi ahenze gake ku isi mu 2024. Ubushobozi bwikuba kabiri buri mwaka mu turere twinshi.
kinyarwanda.cheapest_electricity_in_history_grid_i: Amashanyarazi ahenze gake mu mateka. Guhuza urusobe ni cyo kibazo nyamukuru ubu.
kinyarwanda.distributed_resilient_typical_5kw_syst: Byatataniye + bikomeye. Kugarura amafaranga ya sisitemu isanzwe ya 5kW: imyaka 6–10.
kinyarwanda.1_3_of_food_is_wasted_preventing_waste: 1/3 by'ibiryo birapfa ubusa. Kubuza gutakaza birinda methane iva mu irunda KANDI isohoka ryo guhinga ibiryo.
kinyarwanda.not_100_vegan_even_cutting_beef_3_a_we: Ntabwo ari 100% vegan — no kugabanya inyama y'inka 3× mu cyumweru bifite ingaruka nini. Birekura ubutaka bwo kongera guteramo amashyamba.
kinyarwanda.restore_125m_hectares_protects_biodive: Vugurura hegitari 125M. Birinda ubwinshi bw'ibinyabuzima + bikurura CO₂ binyuze mu photosynthèse.
kinyarwanda.plant_where_natural_conditions_support: Tera aho imiterere karemano ishyigikira ikura. Inyungu z'inyongera: gukonjesha, kurinda ikigega cy'amazi.
kinyarwanda.integrating_trees_into_grazing_land_li: Kwinjiza ibiti mu butaka bw'inzuri. Amatungo abona igicucu; ubutaka bubika karubone 4× kuruta inzuri zambaye ubusa.
kinyarwanda.no_till_cover_crops_diverse_rotations_: Kutarima + imyaka ipfuka + kuzunguruka bitandukanye. Byubaka karubone yo mu butaka mu gihe bibungabunga umusaruro.
kinyarwanda.peatlands_store_3_more_carbon_than_for: Ubutaka bwa peat bubika karubone 3× kuruta amashyamba ku isi. Peat yumye = usohora munini.
kinyarwanda.hfcs_are_1_000_9_000_more_potent_than_: Gaze za HFCs zikomeye 1,000–9,000× kuruta CO₂. Ivugururwa rya Kigali (2016) rirazivanaho buhoro.
kinyarwanda.evs_produce_50_70_less_lifetime_emissi: EV zisohora isohoka ry'ubuzima bwose 50–70% gake kuruta lisansi — biratera imbere uko urusobe rusukuye.
kinyarwanda.electric_trains_move_a_passenger_km_at: Gari za moshi z'amashanyarazi zitwara umugenzi-km ku 1/10 by'isohoka ry'imodoka.
kinyarwanda.dutch_cycling_cities_have_1_3_the_tran: Imijyi y'amagare y'Ubuholandi ifite 1/3 by'isohoka ry'ubwikorezi. Ibikorwa remezo bishinga imyitwarire.
kinyarwanda.insulation_heat_pumps_led_lighting_us_: Isolation + pompe z'ubushyuhe + amatara ya LED. Amazu ya Amerika akoresha 40% by'ingufu z'ibanze.
kinyarwanda.3_4_more_efficient_than_gas_furnaces_w: Zikora neza 3–4× kuruta amatanura ya gaze. Zikora kugeza −15°C mu bwoko bugezweho bw'ikirere gikonje.
kinyarwanda.consistently_top_ranked_educated_women: Buri gihe ku isonga. Abagore bize bafite abana bake KANDI ubuzima bufite ingaruka nini. Byiyongera mu bisekuru.
kinyarwanda.replaces_wood_charcoal_fires_benefits_: Bisimbura umuriro w'inkwi/amakara. Inyungu: ikirere + ihumana ry'umwuka wo mu nzu (rwica 4M/umwaka) + gutema amashyamba.
kinyarwanda.grows_60_faster_than_land_trees_seques: Ikura 60× vuba kuruta ibiti byo ku butaka. Ibika CO₂ + isubiza uburobyi + ifumbire.
kinyarwanda.very_low_emissions_paris_aligned: Isohoka Rike Cyane — Rihuye na Paris
kinyarwanda.middle_of_the_road_current_pledges: Hagati mu Nzira — Amasezerano ya None
kinyarwanda.walk_bike_or_bus_to_school: Genda n'amaguru, ku igare, cyangwa kuri bisi ujya ku ishuri
kinyarwanda.try_one_meatless_meal_per_week: Gerageza ifunguro rimwe ridafite inyama mu cyumweru
kinyarwanda.talk_to_your_family_about_energy_choic: Vugana n'umuryango wawe ku mahitamo y'ingufu
kinyarwanda.plant_a_tree_or_start_a_school_garden: Tera igiti cyangwa tangira ubusitani bw'ishuri
kinyarwanda.start_a_recycling_program_at_school: Tangira gahunda yo gukoresha bundi bushya ku ishuri
kinyarwanda.climate_explorer_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Climate Explorer. Amahinguriro ya klavariye: 1 kugeza 6 bihindura amashami, Q ihindura ikizamini.
kinyarwanda.export_your_climate_report_to_clipboar: Ohereza raporo yawe y'ikirere kuri clipboard
kinyarwanda.hero_ppm: CO₂ uyu munsi: ~424 ppm — hejuru cyane mu myaka irenga miliyoni 3
kinyarwanda.mission_panel_copy: Va ku makuru bwite ujye ku bimenyetso by'isi, ubutabera, n'ibisubizo. Laboratwari za politike n'iza guhatira zo mu rwego rwo hejuru zigumaho iyo uzagura.
kinyarwanda.hide_advanced_labs: Hisha laboratwari zo mu rwego rwo hejuru
kinyarwanda.show_advanced_labs: Erekana laboratwari zo mu rwego rwo hejuru
kinyarwanda.average_us_household_emits_16_tons_co_: Urugo rusanzwe rwa Amerika rusohora ~16 tone CO₂/umwaka. Ibikoresho binini ni ugushyushya urugo, ubwikorezi, n'imirire — atari sipoma za plastike.
kinyarwanda.solar_wind_are_now_cheaper_than_new_fo: Izuba + umuyaga ubu bihenze gake kuruta inganda nshya z'ibinyabutabire mu masoko menshi. Igice kigoye ni uguhuza urusobe, atari igiciro cyo gukora.
kinyarwanda.continuous_co_measurement_at_mauna_loa: Gupima CO₂ ku buryo buhoraho i Mauna Loa kuva 1958 — inyandiko y'ikirere imaze igihe kirekire. Ishusho y'amenyo y'umusumeno iva mu photosynthèse y'Uruhande rwo mu majyaruguru rw'isi.
kinyarwanda.thresholds_where_the_system_shifts_sta: Imbibi aho sisitemu ihindura imiterere igasigara ari yo — gushonga kwa Greenland, kugabanuka kwa Amazon, kugabanuka kwa AMOC. Ubushakashatsi bushya bwerekana ko zimwe zishobora kuba hafi kuruta uko byatekerezwaga.
kinyarwanda.the_countries_that_emitted_the_least_f: Ibihugu byasohoye gake bihura n'ingaruka mbi kurusha ibindi. Ikirere ni ikibazo cy'uburinganire mbere ya byose — kwibasirwa bikurikira amafaranga, geografiya, n'inshingano z'amateka.
kinyarwanda.drawdown_ranks_100_solutions_by_gigato: Drawdown ishyira ibisubizo 100 ku rutonde ku gigatoni za CO₂ zirinzwe. Ibikonjesha, gutakaza ibiryo, no kwigisha abakobwa biri ku isonga — atari ibyo abantu benshi batekereza.
kinyarwanda.climate_policy_pathways_40_year_maine_: Inzira za Politike y'Ikirere: kampanye y'imyaka 40 ya Maine
kinyarwanda.interactive_climate_explorer_carbon_fo: Kwerekana ishusho ya donut y'ikirenge cya karubone ya Climate Explorer ihuza
kinyarwanda.interactive_climate_explorer_emissions: Kwerekana urutonde rw'igihe rw'isohoka rya Climate Explorer ihuza
kinyarwanda.annual_global_co2_emission_rate: Igipimo cy'isohoka rya CO2 ku isi buri mwaka
kinyarwanda.locked_in_at_1_5_c_sustained_warming_m: Bipfundikiye ku ~1.5°C by'ubushyuhe bukomeje. Ubwinshi bwo kwitoza ku nkombe biracyashoboka hifashishijwe inkuta z'inyanja, kwisubiraho biyobowe.
kinyarwanda.associated_with_2_5_c_warming_displace: Bifitanye isano na ~2.5°C by'ubushyuhe. Byimura abantu benshi kuruta intambara iyo ari yo yose mu mateka. Umuraba w'inkubi w'inyanja uba ikiza ku turere two mu gihugu.
kinyarwanda.likely_by_2300_at_3_c_entire_nations_l: Bishoboka mu 2300 kuri 3°C. Amahanga yose atakaza ubutaka bwo gutuura. New Orleans, Venise, n'igice kinini cya Vietnam.
kinyarwanda.multi_century_commitment_at_4_c_warmin: Ubwiyemezo bw'ibinyejana byinshi ku bushyuhe bwa 4°C. Bisaba guhirima kwa Greenland + Antarctique y'Uburengerazuba. Geografiya y'inkombe y'umuco w'abantu yandikwa bundi bushya burundu.
kinyarwanda.locked_in_with_greenland_most_of_west_: Bipfundikiye na Greenland + igice kinini cya Antarctique y'Uburengerazuba byabuze. Inkombe ishyushye kuruta iya gihe cya Pliocène. Ibinyejana kugeza ku bihumbi by'imyaka kugira ngo bisohore burundu.
kinyarwanda.cop28_note_25_of_all_historical_co: COP28 — icyitonderwa: ~25% bya CO₂ yose y'amateka
kinyarwanda.record_year_pakistan_floods_alone_disp: Umwaka w'urutonde — imyuzure ya Pakistan yonyine yimuye ~8.2M
kinyarwanda.pressure_the_loss_damage_fund_pledge_u: Sunika isezerano ry'Ikigega cy'Igihombo n'Ibyangiritse ryiyongere
kinyarwanda.ipcc_first_assessment_report: Raporo ya Mbere y'Isuzuma ya IPCC
kinyarwanda.un_framework_convention_on_climate_cha: Amasezerano-Fatizo y'Umuryango w'Abibumbye ku Ihindagurika ry'Ikirere
kinyarwanda.aosis_proposes_loss_damage_at_cop1_ber: AOSIS itanga igitekerezo cy'Igihombo n'Ibyangiritse muri COP1 Berlin
kinyarwanda.idmc_begins_tracking_weather_displacem: IDMC itangira gukurikirana ukwimuka guterwa n'ikirere
kinyarwanda.paris_agreement_article_8_mentions_l_d: Amasezerano ya Paris — Ingingo ya 8 ivuga L&D
kinyarwanda.un_hrc_teitiota_v_new_zealand_ruling: Icyemezo cya UN HRC Teitiota v. New Zealand
kinyarwanda.world_bank_groundswell_part_ii_report: Raporo ya World Bank Groundswell Igice II
kinyarwanda.cop27_sharm_el_sheikh_l_d_fund_created: COP27 Sharm el-Sheikh — Ikigega cya L&D cyashyizweho
kinyarwanda.cop28_dubai_l_d_fund_capitalized: COP28 Dubai — Ikigega cya L&D cyahawe imari
kinyarwanda.first_l_d_fund_disbursements: Ubwishyu bwa mbere bw'Ikigega cya L&D
kinyarwanda.pick_the_biggest_impact_solution: Hitamo igisubizo gifite ingaruka nini kurusha ibindi
kinyarwanda.no_major_political_or_climate_event_ro: Nta gikorwa kinini cya politiki cyangwa cy'ikirere. Akazi gasanzwe ka politike gakomeje.
kinyarwanda.you_hit_deep_decarbonization_across_se: Wageze ku ivanwaho ry'imbitse rya karubone mu nzego zose, wubatse ubukomeye, kandi ushyira uburinganire hagati. Uku ni ko impinduka y'ikirere yatsinze igaragara iyo amasezerano y'imibereho akomeza.
kinyarwanda.significant_decarbonization_across_the: Ivanwaho rikomeye rya karubone mu nzego z'ingufu n'ubwikorezi, ariko kwitoza n'ubutabera byasigaye inyuma. Imirongo ya karubone ni myiza; ihuriro rya politiki ni ridakomeye.
kinyarwanda.some_sectors_moved_others_stalled_publ: Inzego zimwe zateye imbere. Izindi zahagaze. Inkunga y'abaturage yagabanutse mu gihe. Iyi ni yo nzira ubwinshi bwa politike z'ikirere nyazo z'isi zanyuzemo.
kinyarwanda.decarbonization_stalled_adaptation_gap: Ivanwaho rya karubone ryahagaze. Icyuho cyo kwitoza cyagutse. Inkunga y'abaturage yaguye. Iyi ni yo nzira dukora kugira ngo twirinde: ingaruka z'ikirere zikusanya nta bikorwa remezo by'imibereho cyangwa ikoranabuhanga byo gusubiza.
kinyarwanda.initial_conditions_are_workable_spread: Imiterere y'ibanze irashoboka. Saranganya ishoramari mu nzego 2-3 mu gihe cya mbere kugira ngo umenye amategeko ya feedback afata mbere. Uburezi bw'abaturage + inteko z'abaturage bitanga inyungu buhoro ariko birambye.
kinyarwanda.positive_feedback_dominates_earth_warm: Feedback nziza iratsinda; Isi ishyuha yerekeza ku iringaniza rishyushye kurushaho. (Icyuzi-shyushye “kitagenzurwa” nyakuri — inyanja zisiba zigahinduka umwuka — ni ibihe bya Venus, atari Isi kuri iyi mihatire.)
kinyarwanda.high_albedo_negative_feedback_ice_age_: Albedo iri hejuru + feedback mbi. Inzira y'igihe cy'urubura.
kinyarwanda.forcings_partially_offset_climate_slow: Guhatira bihagarikana igice. Ikirere kigenda buhoro.
kinyarwanda.energy_balance_diagram_shortwave_sunli: Igishushanyo cy'iringaniza ry'ingufu: urumuri rw'izuba rw'umuraba mugufi runyura mu rwego rwa gaze z'ikirere rugashyushya ubuso; ubuso busohora infrared, iyo urwego rwa gaze rufata igice rukayisohora bundi bushya hasi, rugafata ubushyuhe.
kinyarwanda.hypothesis_when_does_albedo_overcome_g: Igitekerezo: Ni ryari albedo itsinda guhatira kwa GHG?
kinyarwanda.explain_how_albedo_cloud_feedback_and_: Sobanura uko albedo, feedback y'ibicu, na GHGs bitwara imiterere y'ikirere hamwe.
